response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two distinct musical performances. 2. Identified 'Rivals and Equals' by Mori Calliope (00:00-03:04). 3. Identified 'I can't control myself' performed by Mori Calliope and IRyS (03:04-05:01). 4. Searched for official lyrics for both. 5. Found lyrics for 'Rivals and Equals' and 'I can't control myself' (original by AZKi). 6. Compiled all metadata and lyrics into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by VTubers Mori Calliope and IRyS, including individual and duet performances of the songs 'Rivals and Equals' and 'I can't control myself', respectively.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope performs her song 'Rivals and Equals' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
base instincts take control
like primal ways of a warrior
is it glory you're after, like me?
underestimated everywhere i turn

taking aim but it doesn't make a difference at all
i got a million different enemies i cannot recall
you're rocking up to a battle when you know that you'll fall
hidden motivation, watch it all burn

i gotta tell you
i never liked you
now would i lie to you?
let me ignite you

when thunder crashes down
when the world caves under my pressure
there'll be no one to save
where is your pride, your human will to survive?
was it just empty words for your grave?

i reach inside this soul
now all that remains
is delusion and decay
cuz of you, i live this way

we're not rivals
we're not equals
we're not rivals
you're just confused

lightning never strikes twice in the same spot
so go ahead and run up on me till you get your shot
i see the weapon that you're hiding, come on ready or not
another life and you would never give a second thought

thinkin' your pride's different than mine
ticking all your vital signs off
but we still gotta protect all our friends from our enemies
wouldn't you agree?

forged in fires of hell
god can't betray you
if i'm a fallen angel
what does that make you?
i'm not debasing myself to see the same view
when it's your pride on the line
no one can save you from mine

we're not rivals
we're not equals
we're not rivals
we're not equals

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and IRyS perform a duet of 'I can't control myself' on stage.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Closed world
A sound heard faintly
It's like we're the only two in the world
A hand that seems to reach, hearts that passed each other
It hurts a little
Wait here, wait here, wait here
Without being able to decide
Bewilderment overflows
I've repeated this so many times
Counting the spilled thoughts
I've repeated this so many times
Waiting for the world, the world to open
Broken world
The needle keeps spinning
Connecting the torn consciousness
Distorted metal sound, ringing in my heart
It echoes a little
Wait here, wait here, wait here
Without being able to connect the memories
It will go crazy and break
I've repeated this so many times
Praying to God, I've repeated this so many times
Waiting for the world, the world to open
Because I don't need anything anymore
Spilled thoughts are an illusion
I've repeated this so many times
Waiting for the world, the world to open
I've repeated this so many times
Praying to God
Repeated so many times
Waiting for the world, the world to open
